storage.title: Secure Cloud Storage Dashboard
storage.description: Upload your Resume, Portfolio, or Profile Picture securely. Stored in a private, encrypted storage bucket and accessed via temporary, timed presigned URLs.
storage.dropzoneMain: Select a file to upload or drag & drop it here
storage.dropzoneSub: Images (JPEG, PNG, WEBP, GIF up to 5MB) or Documents (PDF, DOC, DOCX, TXT up to 10MB)
storage.gdprConsent: I consent to the collection, processing, and storage of my uploaded file, which may contain personally identifiable information (PII) like my name, email, or telephone number, for job applications and company matching in accordance with GDPR regulations.
storage.gdprWarning: GDPR data processing consent is mandatory to upload files.
storage.failedUpload: Failed to upload file. Please check file type and size constraints.
storage.premiumTitle: Premium Storage Space & Safe Multi-Currency Handling
storage.premiumDesc: To support extended storage and multi-currency billing, we utilize a secure localized calculation engine. View the simulated activation charge below:
storage.noFiles: No files uploaded yet. Secure your files now.
storage.errorMime: Unsupported file type. Please select common images or document formats.
storage.errorSizeImage: Image size exceeds the maximum limit of 5MB.
storage.errorSizeDoc: Document size exceeds the maximum limit of 10MB.
storage.devPortalSub: Log in using default developer credentials to connect with the backend API.
